title: untitled
content:
一个明亮的赛博朋克都市午后，阳光倾泻而下，将高耸的玻璃幕墙与霓虹招牌镀上一层金色的暖光，仿佛未来之城在白昼里短暂卸下夜的伪装，露出一种奇异的、近乎温柔的喧嚣。
从略微侧面的视角望去，街道如一条蜿蜒的河流向前延伸：上方是层层叠叠的高架公路，流线型的磁悬浮车辆与老式改装跑车交织穿梭，引擎的低吼与电子蜂鸣混杂成城市的脉搏。下方，人群在人行道上涌动——有戴着增强现实眼镜的行人、背着荧光背包的街头艺术家、推着悬浮小车的商贩，他们的影子在斑马线与路面投影的 holographic 广告上拉长、交叠。
两侧建筑高低错落：摩天大楼直刺云霄，表面爬满动态广告屏，滚动着日文、英文与虚拟偶像的巨型影像，色彩在阳光下仍旧刺眼却不刺痛；低矮的街边店铺挤在一起，橱窗里闪烁着 LED 灯带，售卖从赛博义体零件到街头拉面的一切。电线杆歪斜着矗立，像老树的残骸，缠绕着层层电缆与小型无人机充电站；路边的公交站台上，几个人倚着透明的智能屏等待，屏上实时刷新着下一班无人驾驶巴士的倒计时。
空气中弥漫着咖啡、机油与街头小吃的混合气味，阳光从高架的缝隙洒下，在地面投出长长的光柱与斑驳的阴影。街标、限速线、停车指示牌都带着未来感的荧光涂层，在日光下微微发亮，却又带着一丝怀旧的粗糙——这是一座既向前狂奔又不愿完全抛弃过去的城市。
一切细节都清晰而饱满：行人脸上的细微表情、车辆反光镜里的倒影、广告屏边缘因热浪而轻微扭曲的像素……阳光让这个通常在黑夜中才苏醒的世界显得格外真实，又格外虚幻，像一场白日梦，盛开在钢筋水泥与代码的交界处。

In the style of Blade Runner 2049.
Photograph of a Italian nude woman, lying spread-eagled her back on a very large metallic autopsy table, taken from a top-down angle. She is bound with many chains in an intricate pattern across her chest and arms, with her hands tied behind her back. Her eyes are open, and her head is tilted slightly to the side. She is wearing a metallic chain covering her genitals (no thong), exposing her buttocks and genitals. A collar, attached to the metal table, encircles her neck. Metal brackets, fixed to the table, restrain her wrists.

She is an Italian woman, in her twenties, with green-brown eyes, with long auburn hair, defined cheekbones, and full lips. Delicate beauty makeup with mascara, eyeliner and glossy red lipstick.
**[Environment / background]**
The background is entirely covered with slightly textured, dirty, white square tiles, along with a lot of debris. Flexible, fluorescent green and red plastic tubes run across the floor and end at the autopsy table. Numerous debris cover the floor, graffiti on the walls. Green neon light in the background.
**[Lighting]**
The depth of field is medium: the woman is sharp and the floor is slightly blurred.  The lighting is dim and diffuse, with soft shadows. Green neon lits the background.
**[Mood]**
Cinematic, dark science fiction, Blade Runner 2049 style
**[Style / medium]**
Fine-art studio photography.
**[Technical notes]**
The composition uses the rule of thirds, with the woman's body positioned along the vertical lines. The aesthetic quality is high, with a clear, sharp image and a visually appealing contrast between the woman's skin and the white floor. 
The photograph is nsfw due to the nudity and bondage. The vantage height is eye-level
